What does the `*args` syntax in a function definition allow you to do?
options: Pass a dictionary of keyword arguments
Pass any number of positional arguments
questions.answer: Pass any number of positional arguments

questions.question: Which of the following correctly defines a list comprehension that returns even numbers from 0 to 9?
options: [x for x in range(10) if x % 2 = 0]
[x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]
[x if x % 2 == 0 for x in range(10)]
{x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0}
questions.answer: [x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]
